[38;2;68;68;68m[39m[38;2;105;112;112m-- depending on context. This is complex to parse, so we've settled on never[39m[38;2;68;68;68m[39m
[38;2;68;68;68m[39m[38;2;105;112;112m-- considering it part of the number across hightlight.js. If this test ever[39m[38;2;68;68;68m[39m
